chapter_title.en: To the governor of Basra upon learning that he had accepted an invitation to a lavish banquet

text: فَاتَّقِ اللهَ يَا ابْنَ حُنَيْفٍ، وَلْتَكْفُفْ أَقْرَاصُكَ، لِيَكُونَ مِنْ النَّارِ خَلَاصُكَ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: Therefore, O’ Ibn Ḥunayf, fear Allāh and be content with your own loaves so that you may escape Hell.
